required_preferences.fact: Tries at least one new gluten-free, low-sodium, and low-glycemic recipe every week — avoids recipes with wheat, gluten, or high-glycemic ingredients entirely

supersedes.fact: Tries at least one new gluten-free, low-sodium recipe every week — avoids recipes with wheat or gluten ingredients entirely

required_preferences.fact: Prefers facilitating in-person educational workshops for retired educators — drastically reduces library lecture attendance during workshop period

supersedes.fact: Attends live lectures or author talks at the library regularly — avoids online-only events unless teaching

required_preferences.fact: Sets aside one evening per week for intergenerational activities like board games or storytelling with his granddaughter
Starts every morning by reading one local news article with coffee — never checks national news first
Prefers group chats for event coordination — avoids one-on-one messaging for plans
Arranges all medical appointments and eye treatments for mid-morning hours to avoid fatigue or low blood sugar episodes later in the day

persona: A retired teacher who enjoys group tours with friends
